name: @openclaw/acpx-provenance
description: Provenance tracking module for ACP server integration

scripts.test: node -e "const { ProvenanceManager, parseProvenanceMode } = require('./provenance'); const m = new ProvenanceManager(parseProvenanceMode('meta+receipt')); m.captureIngress({sessionKey: 'test'}); console.log(m.injectIngress('test')); console.log(m.injectToolCall('read_file')); console.log(m.injectCompletion(100)); console.log(JSON.stringify(m.buildEnvelope(), null, 2));"
